title: Google authorisation popup does not appear when trying to add Gmail account to Thunderbird
creator: mail303
content: I am trying to add a Gmail account to Thunderbird. After clicking Continue from the configuration window, the system shows a 'Waiting for authorisation in login popup' window with a rotating circle, which eventually finishes and the window says 'Authentication error. Unable to log in at server. . . .'. As I understand it, the login popup window should be from Google asking me to confirm that it is OK for Thunderbird to connect to the Gmail server. It looks like that Google popup is being blocked. Does anyone have any suggestions as to how to get the Google permission popup to appear?

title: Problem adding CALDAV addressbook
creator: DMan
content:
I have several email accounts hosted by One.Com. I have NO problems synchronising the emails in Thunderbird with IMAP. However I do not succeed to synchonise the Contacts. The Contacts list for each of these accounts are available through CALDAV. The format of the URL is https://caldav.one.com/addressbooks/users/user@example.com/contacts .

I am running Thunderbird 148.0.1 on Windows 11 and as far as I understand should this version support CALDAV. Thunderbird does not recognise the contacts list when adding the email account. I tried to manually add the address book (remote address book) but I get stuck in the Account Hub. When I enter username and URL the account hub responds with the message "caldav.one.com is known to be incompatible with Thunderbird" (translation from Swedish!). I then also tried with several Add ons without result.

Does someone has a work around?
